---
pagetitle: "Submit Resource - Architecture 2.0"
description: "Submit papers, posts, talks, datasets, and references to the Architecture 2.0 reading list."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="site-wrap submit-page">
<header class="site-masthead">
  <span class="pill">Architecture 2.0</span>
  <span class="pill hot">Resource submissions</span>
</header>

<section class="site-hero">
  <div class="hub-kicker">Submit</div>
  <h1>Submit a resource</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Add a paper, post, talk, dataset, report, or reference to the Architecture 2.0 reading list.</p>
</section>

<p class="site-lede">
Use this page to prepare a resource card for the reading list. The final step
opens a GitHub issue form, which means the submission remains tied to a GitHub
account and the workflow can open a reviewable pull request.
</p>

<div class="artifact-submit-layout">
  <form id="submission-form" class="submit-form">
    <section class="submit-section">
      <h2>Resource card</h2>
      <label>
        <span>Resource title <b>*</b></span>
        <input name="resource_title" required placeholder="Architecture 2.0: Challenges and Opportunities">
      </label>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>URL <b>*</b></span>
          <input name="url" required type="url" placeholder="https://...">
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Resource type <b>*</b></span>
          <select name="kind" required>
            <option>Paper</option>
            <option>Article</option>
            <option>Blog post</option>
            <option>Podcast</option>
            <option>Talk</option>
            <option>Report</option>
            <option>Dataset</option>
            <option>Tool documentation</option>
            <option>Workshop writeup</option>
            <option>Other</option>
          </select>
        </label>
      </div>
      <label>
        <span>Short description <b>*</b></span>
        <textarea name="description" required rows="3" placeholder="A concise explanation of what this resource contributes to Architecture 2.0."></textarea>
      </label>
    </section>

    <section class="submit-section">
      <h2>Credit and source</h2>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Venue or source</span>
          <input name="venue" placeholder="IEEE Computer, SIGARCH Computer Architecture Today, ISCA 2023">
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Date or year</span>
          <input name="date" placeholder="2025 or June 14, 2023">
        </label>
      </div>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Author(s)</span>
          <input name="authors" placeholder="Vijay Janapa Reddi; Amir Yazdanbakhsh">
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>DOI</span>
          <input name="doi" placeholder="10.1109/MC.2024.3521641">
        </label>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="submit-section">
      <h2>Topic</h2>
      <label>
        <span>Primary topic <b>*</b></span>
        <select name="category" required>
          <option>Architecture 2.0</option>
          <option>Papers</option>
          <option>Blog posts</option>
          <option>Agentic AI</option>
          <option>Benchmarks and Datasets</option>
          <option>Tools and Infrastructure</option>
          <option>Talks</option>
          <option>Computer Architecture</option>
          <option>Foundations</option>
          <option>Workshops</option>
        </select>
      </label>
    </section>

    <div class="submit-actions">
      <button class="site-action submit-button" type="submit">Continue submission <span class="arr" aria-hidden="true">&rarr;</span></button>
      <button class="site-action secondary submit-button" type="button" id="copy-submit-body">Copy generated body</button>
    </div>
  </form>

  <div class="submit-aside">
    <div class="submit-preview-card">
      <h2>Public card preview</h2>
      <div class="submit-card-demo">
        <div class="submit-card-title"><span id="preview-title">Resource title</span><span>&nearr;</span></div>
        <p id="preview-description">Short description appears here.</p>
        <div class="submit-card-credit">
          <span id="preview-authors">Author(s)</span>
          <span id="preview-venue">Venue or source</span>
          <span id="preview-date">Date or year</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tool-card-categories">
          <span class="tool-card-category" id="preview-category">Topic</span>
          <span class="tool-card-tag" id="preview-kind">Type</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="submit-preview-card">
      <h2>Generated issue body</h2>
      <textarea id="submit-body-preview" readonly rows="16" aria-label="Generated resource submission body"></textarea>
    </div>

    <div class="submit-preview-card">
      <h2>Other submissions</h2>
      <p>Artifacts and workshops use the same site-guided GitHub issue to pull request flow.</p>
      <p><a href="/submit.html">Submit an artifact</a></p>
      <p><a href="/submit-workshop.html">Submit a workshop</a></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<script>
window.arch2SubmitConfig = {
  template: "submit_resource.yml",
  titlePrefix: "[Resource]: ",
  titleField: "resource_title",
  titleFallback: "<resource title>",
  labels: [
    ["Resource title", "resource_title"],
    ["URL", "url"],
    ["Resource type", "kind"],
    ["Venue or source", "venue"],
    ["Date or year", "date"],
    ["Author(s)", "authors"],
    ["DOI", "doi"],
    ["Primary topic", "category"],
    ["Short description", "description"]
  ],
  preview: [
    ["#preview-title", "resource_title", "Resource title"],
    ["#preview-description", "description", "Short description appears here."],
    ["#preview-authors", "authors", "Author(s)"],
    ["#preview-venue", "venue", "Venue or source"],
    ["#preview-date", "date", "Date or year"],
    ["#preview-category", "category", "Topic"],
    ["#preview-kind", "kind", "Type"]
  ]
};
</script>
<script src="submit-form.js"></script>
```
